/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/jam_plugin.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libjam_plugin.so -o libjam_plugin.so CMakeFiles/jam_plugin.dir/selective_scan_plugin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jam_plugin.dir/selective_scan_plugin.cu.o   -L/usr/local/cuda-13.2/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda-13.2/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/TensorRT-10.16.0.72/lib:/home/yamjune/miniconda3/envs/jamma/lib/python3.10/site-packages/torch/lib:/usr/local/cuda-13.2/targets/x86_64-linux/lib:/home/yamjune/miniconda3/envs/jamma/lib/python3.10/site-packages /usr/local/TensorRT-10.16.0.72/lib/libnvinfer.so /usr/local/cuda-13.2/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcudart.so /home/yamjune/miniconda3/envs/jamma/lib/python3.10/site-packages/torch/lib/libtorch.so /home/yamjune/miniconda3/envs/jamma/lib/python3.10/site-packages/torch/lib/libc10.so /home/yamjune/miniconda3/envs/jamma/lib/python3.10/site-packages/torch/lib/libc10_cuda.so /home/yamjune/miniconda3/envs/jamma/lib/python3.10/site-packages/selective_scan_cuda.cpython-310-x86_64-linux-gnu.so -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
